info.title: HR Portal API
info.description: Modular monolith HR platform API. Business endpoints require Bearer JWT and X-Tenant-Id header.

parameters.name: X-Tenant-Id
parameters.description: Tenant slug (e.g. demo). Required on all business endpoints.
